entries.summary: Trump walked off stage at Butler Pennsylvania rally after shots fired.
Al Jazeera published minute-by-minute timeline of the Butler rally shooting.
Trump treated for injury to right ear, said he was doing well.
Al Jazeera contextualized historical assassination attempts against US presidential candidates.
Al Jazeera analyzed what the attack meant for the US election.
Al Jazeera explained how the attempted assassination would be investigated.
Biden and Trump stressed national unity after the assassination attempt.
Al Jazeera gallery captured images of blood on the campaign trail.
Al Jazeera reconstructed the 60 minutes leading up to the attempt.
Secret Service Director Cheatle apologized at Congressional hearing for security failures.
Secret Service Director Cheatle resigned amid mounting Congressional pressure.
Trump survived second assassination attempt at his Florida golf club.
FBI charged Ryan Routh with attempted assassination after the Florida incident.
US Secret Service admitted failures in internal review of Butler shooting.
Trump returned to Butler Pennsylvania for rally at attempted assassination site.
Al Jazeera fact-checked Trump's claims at his return Butler rally.
House bipartisan task force released interim report on Butler rally shooting.
Trump injured at Pennsylvania rally after shots fired during his speech.
CNN liveblog covered immediate aftermath as Trump walked off stage.
CNN published structured timeline of the Butler rally shooting.
Shooter fired from roughly 130 yards away from Trump's podium.
CNN documented what was said on stage immediately after shooting.
CNN published a detailed account of what happened at the rally.
CNN tracked investigation as shooter's motives remained unclear days later.
Trump addressed RNC and recounted being shot at the rally.
Cheatle apologized at Congressional hearing for Secret Service security failures.
Cheatle resigned a day after her Congressional grilling.
FBI completed its interview with Trump about the Butler attack.
Trump survived second assassination attempt at his Florida golf club.
CNN tracked aftermath of second attempt and continuing federal investigation.
CNN reported on Trump's planned return to Butler Pennsylvania rally site.
Trump returned to Butler Pennsylvania for rally at the attack site.
House task force released interim report on Butler attack security failures.
